mapper.insert: insert into base_permission_data(id, management_id, distribution_type, based, org_id, group_id, gb_code, data_resource_id, data_resource,data_resource_code, parent_id, option_permission, state, created_by, created_name, created_date, modified_by, modified_name, modified_date) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{managementId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{distributionType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{based,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orgId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{groupId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{gbCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dataResourceId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dataResource,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{dataResourceCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{parentId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{optionPermission,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{state,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{createdBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createdName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{modifiedBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{modifiedName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{modifiedDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
mapper.update: update base_permission_data set state='0' where id=#{id}

update base_permission_data
management_id=#{managementId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
distribution_type=#{distributionType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
based=#{based,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
org_id=#{orgId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
group_id=#{groupId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
gb_code=#{gbCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
data_resource_id=#{dataResourceId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
data_resource=#{dataResource,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
data_resource_code=#{dataResourceCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
parent_id=#{parentId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
option_permission=#{optionPermission,jdbcType=INTEGER},
state=#{state,jdbcType=INTEGER},
created_by=#{createdBy,jdbcType=BIGINT},
created_name=#{createdName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
created_date=#{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
modified_by=#{modifiedBy,jdbcType=BIGINT},
modified_name=#{modifiedName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
modified_date=#{modifiedDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select count('1') from base_permission_data where state='1'
